phased_honesty_annotation_v1.note: When trades are processed, replay outcomes are read from batch results before shadow_student_v1 emit; decision packet still uses causal bars at entry_time only (no current-trade outcome in packet). Do not claim strict exam-blind process order for this pipeline until job order changes.

wiring_honesty_annotation_v1.as_built_student_pre_reveal_wiring_v1: causal OHLCV bars through decision time; optional retrieved_student_experience_v1; optional versioned student_context_annex_v1 for price/structure/indicator/time buckets.
wiring_honesty_annotation_v1.note: Default seam uses bars + retrieval only; do not market ‘full indicator/regime context’ on the Student path without a validated student_context_annex_v1 (see TRADING_CONTEXT_REFERENCE_V1, §C.1).

memory_semantics_annotation_v1.note: Learning rows match by exact context_signature_v1.signature_key (including candle timeframe suffix) — not feature-space similarity. Do not claim ‘the same pattern again’ from Student v1 retrieval; see ARCHITECTURE §C.2. Engine context_signature_memory is a separate approximate path.

deliverable_vocabulary_annotation_v1.note: Per §0.2, the tradable deliverable is contract-valid student_output_v1 from legal pre-reveal context — not Referee fills alone. Per §0.3, learned behavior requires a pre-registered positive vs a declared baseline — not a lone metric.

tier1_twelve_month_default.reasoning_text: SOLUSDT shows strong upward price momentum with increasing closes and volume, suggesting trend continuation. RSI indicates overbought conditions but price continues to rise, supporting a long bias.
tier1_twelve_month_default.context_interpretation_v1: SOLUSDT shows sustained upward price movement with increasing volume, indicating strong bullish momentum. Price is trading above key EMAs and RSI is in overbought territory but continuing to rise.
tier1_twelve_month_default.hypothesis_text_v1: The price is continuing its upward trend and will likely continue to rise as long as it remains above key moving averages.

risk_inputs_v1.target_basis_v1: 2.0 × R multiple vs stop (1.007998 price move)

nodes_v1.output_summary_v1: Trend, momentum, and range context are computed from those bars only.
